step1.title: Tell us about your salon
step1.subtitle: We need this — to know which country and currency you work in.

step2.title: Add your specialists
step2.subtitle: Takes about 2 minutes. You can edit and add more later.

step3.subtitle: We've added a default list. Adjust the prices and add your own services.

step4.subtitle: These are the main buckets your money goes into. You can add more later.

step5.title: All set, {{name}}!
step5.subtitle: Your dashboard is ready. It's empty for now — add your first visit and the numbers will appear.
step5.benchmarks_title: See how you compare to similar salons
step5.benchmarks_subtitle: I'll show you how your metrics look against the rest — average ticket, occupancy, return rate. Just industry averages, no names or addresses. You can turn it off any time.

services_page.title: Salon services
services_page.subtitle: Prices, cost, margin and service categories.

inventory.title: Inventory & supplies
inventory.subtitle: Track consumables with automatic deduction on each visit and low-stock alerts. Coming in a near-term iteration — driven by real needs from the first salons.

ocr.title: Import from receipt / WZ / order
ocr.subtitle: Upload a PDF or photo — AI reads the items and suggests adding them. You can review and edit before saving.
ocr.soon: Inventory OCR import is in development. Coming soon: drop a receipt/WZ — AI returns a position list, you edit and confirm.

knowledge.title: Knowledge base
knowledge.subtitle: Internal SOPs, recipes, checklists and customer-communication templates for the salon team. Each role sees only what's relevant. Coming in stage 5.

coming_soon.subtitle: This section will be available in stage {{stage}}. It's not here yet — but it's on the roadmap.

dashboard.greeting_subtitle_day: Here's how things are going today.
dashboard.greeting_subtitle_week: Here's how things are going this week.
dashboard.greeting_subtitle_month: Here's how things are going this month.
dashboard.greeting_subtitle_custom: Here's how things are going for the period.

period_picker.subtitle: Any date range for reports and charts

empty.toast_seeded: Done! {{visits}} visits and {{clients}} clients created. Click around the sections to get a feel.

master_bars.title: Revenue by specialist
master_bars.empty: No visits in this period yet

payment_donut.title: Payment type

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Invite teammates: an accountant, an assistant, specialists. Each one sees exactly the data they need for their job.
team.empty: You're the only member so far.
team.invite_subtitle: The user gets an email with a link. The link is valid for 14 days.
team.invite_avatar_hint: Optional. Up to 2 MB. Automatically attached to the staff card on accept.
team.confirm_remove: Remove this member? Their access will be revoked immediately.
team.confirm_cancel_invite: Cancel this invitation? The link in the email will stop working.
team.accept_loading_subtitle: A couple more seconds — and you'll be on the team.
team.accept_error_subtitle: Reach out to whoever invited you, or write to support@finkley.app.

accept_error.already_accepted: This invitation has already been accepted
accept_error.email_mismatch: Email doesn't match the invitation — sign in with the right account

role_hint.admin: Full access, except billing and salon deletion
role_hint.accountant: Sees and edits all finances, doesn't manage the team
role_hint.staff: Sees only their own visits and clients, can't see salon finances

errors.already_member: This user is already on the team
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to invite
errors.avatar_invalid_type: File must be an image (JPG / PNG / WebP)
errors.avatar_failed: Failed to upload photo — try again

help.title: Help
help.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions. If something isn't here — get in touch.
help.still_stuck_body: Drop us a line — we reply within 24 hours on business days. You can also message our Telegram bot — that's where we get bug reports too.
help.footer: Finkley · Management accounting for beauty salons ·

what.title: What is Finkley?
what.body: Finkley is the online dashboard for a beauty salon owner. You see your profit — not appointment listings — but revenue, expenses, net profit, specialist payouts, weekly and monthly trends. No paper, no Excel, no accountant for day-to-day work.

signup.title: How do I get started?
signup.body: Sign up with email or Google in 30 seconds. Then a quick onboarding (1–2 minutes): salon name, country, currency, specialists and services. You can skip any step right there — add it later.

add_visit.title: How do I add a visit?
add_visit.body: Tap the "+ Visit" button in the bottom right — the modal opens from any page. Pick a specialist, service, amount, payment method — save. If the visit isn't paid yet (the client hasn't settled up) — leave it pending and charge it later.

bulk_visits.title: Can I enter several visits at once for a day?
bulk_visits.body: Yes. In the "+ Visit" modal switch to the "Multiple visits" tab — a 3–10 row table where you can enter them all in one go. Handy in the evening to log the whole day at once.

import_booksy.title: How do I pull visits from Booksy?
import_booksy.body: Go to Settings → Integrations → Booksy → enter your Booksy Pro email and password. We'll pull in specialists, services, clients and visits automatically. Then choose how often to auto-sync (from 2 minutes to 24 hours). Your password is encrypted and only used for syncing.

expenses.title: How do I track expenses?
expenses.body: Open the "Expenses" section. Tap "+" — pick a category, amount, date, payment method. You can attach a photo of the receipt (AI will read it and auto-fill the fields). Recurring expenses (rent, specialist payroll) can be set to auto-generate: once a month the system creates the entry for you.

payouts.title: How is specialist payroll calculated?
payouts.body: In the "Specialists" section you set a payout scheme for each one: % of revenue, fixed salary, or a combination. The "Payroll" section automatically calculates what's owed for the chosen period based on all completed visits.

reports.title: What reports are available?
reports.body: P&L (profit and loss), revenue by specialist / service / payment method, occupancy heatmap by day and hour, change vs last month. Any period — day, week, month or custom range. You can print to PDF from the browser.

cancel.title: How do I cancel my subscription?
cancel.body: Settings → Subscription → "Manage subscription" — opens the Stripe customer portal where you can cancel. Access stays until the end of the paid period. You can download all your data any time (Settings → Data export).

export_data.title: How do I download my data?
export_data.body: Settings → Data export. Tap "Download" — we'll bundle a ZIP with CSV files of all your visits, clients, expenses, specialists and services and email you the link. Standard GDPR — your data belongs to you.

delete_account.title: How do I delete my account?
delete_account.body: Settings → at the bottom, "Delete salon". Confirm by typing the salon's name. Deleted permanently: all visits, clients, expenses. If you have several salons, only the current one is deleted, the others stay.

support.title: Where do I write with questions or bugs?
support.body:
Email: support@finkley.app — we reply within 24 hours on business days.
Bugs: right from the app — the bug button in the top right (or our Telegram @finklay_dev_bot). Attach a screenshot and we'll look quickly.

ai.title: AI assistant
ai.subtitle: Helps with KPIs, compares to last month, suggests what to tweak.
ai.confirm_reset: Start a new chat? The previous history will stay in the archive.
ai.empty_title: Hi! I'll help with your salon numbers.
ai.empty_subtitle: I know everything about your visits, specialists, services and expenses. Ask me anything — I'll answer with real data.

suggestions.revenue_this_month: How much did I make this month?
suggestions.top_master: Which specialist brings in the most revenue?
suggestions.compare_prev: Compare this month with last month
suggestions.what_to_improve: What can I improve to grow revenue?

visits.title: Visits

calendar.no_staff: No active staff. Add specialists in Settings → Catalogs → Specialists.

bulk.title: Add multiple visits
bulk.no_valid_rows: Fill in at least one row (specialist + amount)

charge.title: Charge visit

form.subtitle: Logged to your book in a couple of seconds
form.client_discount_hint: Discount {{pct}}% from client profile — will be applied on save
form.toast_booksy_skip_no_external_hint: Staff is not linked to Booksy. Open Settings → Integrations → Sync now to link.
form.comment_placeholder: For example: new client, came on a referral
form.continue_hint: You can enter the next one right away — the specialist and payment are remembered.

visits.empty_hint: Tap "+ Visit" to log your first one.

errors.amount_positive: Amount must be greater than zero

clients.title: Clients
clients.subtitle: Total: {{count}}

errors.bad_recurrence: Period must be between 1 and 365 days

clients.empty: No clients yet. Tap "Add client" — and the first card will appear.
clients.empty_search: Nobody found. Check the name or phone.
clients.confirm_delete: Delete this client? Their visits stay in the book — they just won't be linked to anyone.

form.phone_hint: With country code: +48… for PL, +380… for UA, +7… for RU.
form.notes_placeholder: Anything important to remember about this client
form.discount_hint: Auto-applied in the visit form (off amount). Can be cleared or changed.

drawer.history_empty: No visits with this client yet.

banner.expired_title: Subscription is not active. You can view data, but new entries are temporarily disabled.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Salon profile, team, billing, integrations, security.

catalogs.title: Catalogs
catalogs.subtitle: Salon base data: specialists, services, clients, inventory, expense categories. Analytics — in the “Reports” section.

staff.title: Specialists
staff.subtitle: Employee list, payout schemes, schedules, specializations.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Service catalog with prices, duration, cost and material recipes.

clients.title: Clients
clients.subtitle: Client database with visit history, phones, emails and notes.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Products and supplies, stock, plan-vs-fact, low-stock alerts.

expense_categories.title: Expense categories
expense_categories.subtitle: System + custom categories. Managed on the expenses page.

profile.title: Salon profile
profile.country_hint: Changing country auto-updates the currency and time zone.
profile.logo_hint: PNG / JPG / WEBP / SVG, up to 5 MB. Shown in the header and emails.
profile.logo_too_large: File over 5 MB — pick a smaller one

services.title: Services and pricing
services.subtitle: Cost set for {{withCost}} of {{total}} services — without it margin can't be calculated.
services.empty: No services yet. Click «+ Service» to add the first one.
services.error_invalid: Value must be a non-negative number
services.confirm_archive: Move service to archive? Visit history is kept, but new visits can't be booked for this service.
services.hint: Changes save automatically when you click away. Margin = (price − cost) ÷ price. Green ≥50%, gold 35–50%, red <35%.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Currently {{resolved}} theme is active. Pin it or follow the system.

categories.title: Service & expense categories
categories.subtitle: Rename, add new, archive. History of existing visits and expenses is preserved when archiving.
categories.confirm_archive_system: This is a system category created during salon setup. Archive it anyway?

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Invite an accountant, assistant or specialists with different access levels.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Who changed what in the salon — for transparency and audit.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect Booksy, Fresha and other platforms — visits will sync automatically.

benchmarks.title: Compare with similar salons
benchmarks.subtitle: I'll show you how your metrics look against the industry average — no names or addresses, just anonymized numbers. It helps you see where you're strong and where there's room to grow.
benchmarks.enabled: On — I'll see the comparison on the dashboard
benchmarks.disabled: Off — no comparison is shown, your data isn't used in the aggregate stats

cash.title: Starting cash balance
cash.subtitle: How much cash you already have on hand when you start using Finkley. The "Cash on hand" widget on the dashboard = this number + cash visits − cash expenses.

import.title: Import visits from CSV
import.subtitle: Upload visit history from Booksy / Fresha / Treatwell or your own spreadsheet.

digest.title: Weekly digest
digest.subtitle: An email every Monday: revenue/expenses/profit for the past week + top specialist and top service.
digest.enabled: On — emails will arrive automatically (cron activates once Vault is set up)

calendar.title: Visit calendar (iCal)
calendar.subtitle: Subscribe to your visit feed in Google Calendar / Apple Calendar / Outlook. Updates automatically — you'll see all your bookings right in your calendar.
calendar.how_to: Open Google/Apple Calendar → "Subscribe to calendar" → paste the URL. In Outlook: "Add calendar" → "Subscribe from internet".
calendar.revoke: Revoke link and generate a new one
calendar.confirm_revoke: The current link will stop working in every calendar where you added it. Continue?
calendar.toast_revoked: Link revoked. A new one will be created next time you open this.

api.title: API keys
api.subtitle: Create a key for your own integrations (Zapier, n8n, Make, scripts). Each key is shown only once — when it's created.
api.create_subtitle: Once created, the key is shown one time only — copy it and save it somewhere safe.
api.show_once_subtitle: This is the only time you'll see the full key. Once this dialog closes there's no way to recover it — you'd have to create a new one.
api.confirm_revoke: Revoke this key? Any integrations using it will stop working.

referral.title: Invite friends
referral.subtitle: Share your code — both of you get a free month on the first payment.
referral.fineprint: The bonus is applied automatically after the invitee's first payment. 100% off one month of subscription.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.subtitle_disabled: Turn on 2FA so signing in needs a code from your authenticator app. Protects against password leaks.
mfa.subtitle_enabled: ✅ 2FA is on. Each sign-in requires a 6-digit code from your app.
mfa.confirm_remove: Disable 2FA? Your account will be protected by password only again.
mfa.enroll_subtitle: Scan the QR in your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code to confirm.
mfa.step1: Open an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, Bitwarden, etc.)
mfa.step2: Scan the QR code below or enter the secret manually
mfa.step3: Enter the 6-digit code shown by the app
mfa.manual_secret: Or enter manually (if the QR doesn't scan):

push.title: Push notifications
push.subtitle: Get notified about new visits, expenses and AI insights right in your browser or on your phone — even when the tab is closed.
push.unsupported: Your browser doesn't support Web Push. Try the latest Chrome or Firefox. On iOS — add the app to your home screen first.
push.denied: The browser blocked notifications. Open site settings in your browser (the 🔒 icon next to the URL) and allow Notifications.
push.not_configured: Push isn't set up on the server yet. Get in touch with support.

install.title: Install as an app
install.subtitle: Finkley becomes an icon on your phone's home screen — opens without the browser bar.
install.ios_hint: In Safari tap the "Share" button → "Add to Home Screen".
install.not_available: The browser isn't offering install yet. Use Finkley for a couple of minutes — the button will appear.

export.title: Data export
export.subtitle: All visits, expenses, clients and specialists in CSV — for accounting or GDPR.
export.toast_ready: Archive is ready — download started. The link was emailed to you.
export.toast_cached: There's already an archive from the last 24 hours — opening it.

delete.title: Delete salon
delete.subtitle: All data will be deleted in 30 days. After that it can't be restored.
delete.modal_subtitle: This action can't be undone after the 30-day grace period.
delete.confirm_prompt: To confirm, type the salon name: "{{name}}"

errors.name_too_short: Name must be at least 2 characters

billing.title: Subscription
billing.no_subscription: No subscription. After the 14-day free trial the account becomes read-only.
billing.status_past_due: Payment failed. Update your card in the billing portal.
billing.status_canceled: Cancelled. Access until the end of the paid period.

staff.title: Specialists
staff.subtitle: Name and payout scheme. Specialists stay in your visit history even after archiving.
staff.add_hint: Defaults to the "40% of revenue" scheme — change it after creating.
staff.empty_active: No specialists yet. Add the first one above.
staff.confirm_archive: Move to archive? You can restore later.
staff.sheet_subtitle: Name and payout scheme. Changes apply to future payroll calculations.

percent_revenue.title: % of revenue
percent_revenue.hint: For example 40% — the specialist gets a fixed share from each visit.

fixed.title: Fixed rate
fixed.hint: Same amount per period regardless of revenue. For example, 4000 PLN/month.

percent_service.title: % per service
percent_service.hint: Different percent per service — more flexible than a single rate.

chair_rent.title: Chair rent
chair_rent.hint: The specialist pays a fixed amount for the workspace and keeps all revenue.

mixed.title: Mixed (fixed + %)
mixed.hint: Base plus a percent on top. For example, 2000 PLN + 25% of revenue.

overrides.title: Percent per service
overrides.hint: Empty — service doesn't count toward payroll
overrides.no_services: Add services in salon settings first.
overrides.save_first: Save the specialist to set per-service rates.

errors.name_too_short: Name must be at least 2 characters

overdue.title: {{name}} — time to reach out
overdue.body_today: A visit is scheduled today. Remind the client.
overdue.body_overdue_one: Overdue by {{count}} day — remind the client.
overdue.body_overdue_few: Overdue by {{count}} days — remind the client.
overdue.body_overdue_many: Overdue by {{count}} days — remind the client.

budget.title: Budget exceeded for "{{name}}"
budget.body: Already at {{pct}}% of the limit this month.

integrations.title: Booking platform integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect your account — visits, clients and services will sync automatically. No manual entry.
integrations.connect_subtitle: Enter your {{name}} access details. Your password is encrypted and used only for syncing.
integrations.booksy_config_subtitle: Two questions about how you use Booksy
integrations.booksy_config_intro: This is only used to configure sync logic. We won't change anything in your Booksy.
integrations.booksy_config_q1: Do you mark visit payment statuses in Booksy?
integrations.booksy_config_q1_hint_no: Got it. Then we won't trust payment status from Booksy: all imported visits will be 'unpaid', and you'll mark payments yourself in Finkley.
integrations.booksy_config_q2: Do you ever delete completed visits in Booksy?
integrations.booksy_config_q2_hint_yes: Understood. Once a visit lands in Finkley — we'll never delete it, even if you delete it from Booksy. Changes in the portal are manual only.

booksy_invite.title: Invite masters to Finkley?
booksy_invite.subtitle: Imported from Booksy. Send them email invitations — they'll see their visits and payouts.
booksy_invite.hint: Uncheck anyone you don't want to invite. Edit email or fill it in if Booksy didn't provide one.

errors.emails_required: Provide an email for every selected master
errors.send_failed: Failed to send {{count}} invitations — try again later

integrations.confirm_disconnect: Disconnect this integration? Data stays, but auto-sync will stop.
integrations.confirm_clear_visits: Delete all visits imported from Booksy? This can't be undone. Specialists, services and clients will stay.
integrations.sync_interval_hint: More often = faster pull-in (and a better chance of catching a record before it's deleted in Booksy).
integrations.privacy_note: All passwords are encrypted on the server with AES-256 and never stored in plain text. You can disconnect any time — the data is deleted.
integrations.security_note: We use access only to read visits and clients. We don't write anything to your account on the platform.

fields.ksef_token: Token from “Mój KSeF” (issued via Profil Zaufany)

errors.captcha_not_ready: CAPTCHA hasn't loaded yet — wait a second
errors.booksy_invalid_credentials: Wrong email or password. Check your Booksy Pro details.
errors.booksy_request_blocked: Booksy blocked direct login. Use the "Token" tab — it takes 30 seconds.
errors.booksy_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait 5 minutes and try again.
errors.booksy_no_business: There's no business in this account. Sign in to Booksy Pro and create a salon profile.
errors.wfirma_login_failed: Wrong wfirma.pl email or password. If you have 2FA on, enter the keys manually on the next tab.
errors.wfirma_no_companies: No companies in this wFirma account. Add one in wFirma first and try again.
errors.wfirma_form_changed: wFirma changed their interface — auto-connect is temporarily broken. Enter keys manually on the next tab.
errors.wfirma_captcha: wFirma asked for a CAPTCHA at login. Enter the keys manually on the next tab.
errors.wfirma_keygen_failed: Couldn't get keys from wFirma. Try again or enter them manually.
errors.wfirma_invalid_credentials: Wrong access/secret key pair. Check that you copied them without spaces.
errors.wfirma_company_id_not_found: This company isn't in your wFirma account. Check the Company ID.
errors.wfirma_invalid_keys_format: Access key and Secret key must be 32-character hexadecimal strings.
errors.wfirma_invalid_company_id: Company ID is a number (e.g. 884136). Find it in the URL after sign-in.
errors.wfirma_auto_login_disabled: Auto-connect is temporarily disabled. Enter the keys manually on the next tab.
errors.ksef_invalid_nip: NIP must be 10 digits. Spaces and dashes are fine — we'll strip them.
errors.ksef_invalid_token: Token must be at least 32 characters. Copy it from “Mój KSeF” → Tokeny.
errors.ksef_invalid_credentials: KSeF rejected this token. Make sure the NIP and token belong to the same company.
errors.ksef_challenge_failed: KSeF isn't responding to the challenge — try again later or check the environment (test/prod).
errors.ksef_api_error: KSeF API error. Details are logged — try again in a minute.
errors.fakturownia_invalid_credentials: Wrong Fakturownia API token. Check Settings → Integrations → API.
errors.fakturownia_invalid_subdomain: Fakturownia subdomain not found. It's the part of the URL BEFORE `.fakturownia.pl` (e.g. `mysalon`).
errors.fakturownia_api_error: Fakturownia API error. Try again in a minute.
errors.infakt_invalid_credentials: inFakt rejected the token. Make sure you have partner access.
errors.infakt_api_error: inFakt API error. Try again in a minute.
errors.infakt_not_partner_yet: The inFakt integration is in the partner-application stage — code is ready, keys aren't issued yet.

booksy.token_help: If direct login didn't work, you can grab a session token from the browser in 30 seconds:
booksy.token_step1: Open booksy.com/pro and sign in to your account the usual way
booksy.token_step2: Press F12 → Network tab → find any request to pl.booksy.com → copy the value of the x-access-token header
booksy.token_step3: Paste the token here — we'll verify and save it

wfirma.dialog_subtitle: Enter your wfirma.pl login/password — we'll fetch the API keys automatically. If you have 2FA or auto-connect didn't work — there's a manual entry tab.
wfirma.quick_subtitle: Enter your wFirma login/password. We'll sign in once, create a "Finkley" app in your account, and store its keys. Your password isn't kept on our server.
wfirma.security_note: We use the password only once — at the moment of creating the key. The keys themselves are encrypted on the server (AES-256). You can remove "Finkley" from connected apps any time in wfirma.pl → Ustawienia → OAuth → Klucze API.
wfirma.manual_step1: Sign in to wfirma.pl with your account
wfirma.manual_step2: Open Ustawienia → OAuth → Klucze API → Dodaj
wfirma.manual_step3: Enter a name (e.g. "Finkley"), confirm with your password and copy Access key + Secret key
wfirma.manual_step4: Find the Company ID in the URL after signing in (e.g. 884136)
wfirma.manual_company_id_hint: It's the number next to your company name or after /site_index/ in the URL.
wfirma.choose_company_subtitle: There are several companies in your wFirma account. Pick which one to link this salon to in Finkley — we'll only sync expenses from it.

ksef.dialog_subtitle: Connect Poland's national e-invoice registry (KSeF) if you don't use wFirma/Fakturownia. Supplier invoices flow into expenses automatically.
ksef.step1: Sign in to ksef.mf.gov.pl via Profil Zaufany
ksef.step3: Pick the “Wgląd w faktury” role (read-only access)
ksef.step4: Copy the token and paste it here. NIP is your 10-digit tax ID.
ksef.token_hint: The token is a long alphanumeric string. Valid for 90+ days.
ksef.security_note: The token is encrypted on the server (AES-256). Read-only access (Wgląd role). Revoke any time in “Mój KSeF” → Tokeny.

booksy.description: Poland's #1 online booking platform for beauty salons. We'll pull visits, clients and services from your account.

fresha.description: Global booking platform (UK / EU / US). Free for salons, supports visits + sales.

treatwell.description: UK and European marketplace for beauty salon bookings.

yclients.description: Popular platform in Ukraine, Russia and Kazakhstan. CRM + online booking + scheduling.

wfirma.description: Polish accounting system (JDG/spółka). The integration sends expenses as purchase invoices and pulls in income. KSeF-ready.

ksef.description: Poland's national e-invoice system (KSeF). Connect this if you don't use wFirma/Fakturownia — supplier invoices flow into expenses straight from the registry.

fakturownia.description: Polish SaaS for accounting and invoicing. We sync expenses and payments both ways.

infakt.description: inFakt — Polish service for sole traders and companies. Integration is in partner-application stage — coming soon.

categories.accounting_subtitle: Polish accounting portals and KSeF. Connect one — purchase invoices land in expenses on their own.
categories.booking_subtitle: Online booking platforms. Visits, clients and services sync automatically.
categories.banking_subtitle: Connect bank accounts via PSD2 — operations are auto-matched to expenses and visit payments.
categories.documents_subtitle: AI receipt and invoice recognition for expenses that didn't land in KSeF.

integrations.tab_empty: Nothing connected in this category yet.
integrations.documents_body: OCR runs automatically when you upload a receipt in the expense form: AI extracts amount, date, vendor and NIP. There are no separate settings — just snap a photo on the Expenses page and we do the rest. If the receipt has a buyer NIP matching your company, the expense is auto-sent to the connected accounting portal.

import.title: Import visits from CSV
import.subtitle: Upload a file, map columns to Finkley fields, check the preview and run. Duplicates (if you reupload the same file) are skipped automatically.

upload.title: Upload a CSV file
upload.subtitle: Files from Booksy, Fresha, Treatwell and standard Excel/Google Sheets exports as CSV are supported.
upload.formats: Separator can be a comma or semicolon (auto-detected). Quotes are optional.

mapping.title: Map your columns
mapping.subtitle: Found {{count}} rows. Confirm or adjust the auto-mapping.

import.ready: Ready to import: {{count}} rows. Existing visits with the same content will be skipped.

errors.empty: File is empty or has no headers
errors.missing_required: Map at least "Visit date" and "Amount" to continue.

income.title: Income
income.subtitle: All revenue sources: visits, retail sales and other receipts.
income.sales_placeholder: Retail sales — extended section in development. For now product sales are tracked as visits with kind=retail; a dedicated filter will land here next sprint.

sales.title: Retail sales
sales.empty: No sales for this month. Press “+ Visit” in the bottom-right corner — the Sale tab will open.

other.title: Other income
other.empty: No entries yet. Add irregular receipts here: chair rent, bank cashback, interest, supplier refunds.

errors.amount_positive: Amount must be greater than zero

reports_hub.title: Reports
reports_hub.subtitle: Analytics by catalogs. Specialist/service/client CRUD lives in Settings → Catalogs.

services.title: Revenue by service
services.empty: No services performed in this period.

clients.title: Top clients by revenue
clients.empty: No client visits in this period.

cashflow.title: Cash flow
cashflow.no_tx_for_day: No detailed transactions for this day

payments.title: Payments to make
payments.subtitle: Scheduled supplier payments. Auto-import from wFirma/Fakturownia/KSeF — next sprint; add manually for now.
payments.empty: No payments. Add an invoice to pay — it will appear in the calendar with a due date.
payments.confirm_delete: Remove this payment from the calendar?

errors.amount_positive: Amount must be greater than zero

reports.title: Finance
reports.subtitle: Financial picture for the period: P&L, revenue by specialist / service / payment method, occupancy by day and hour.

heatmap.title: Occupancy by day and hour
heatmap.legend: Business hours 8:00–21:00. Color = number of visits; the darker, the more.

payouts.title: Payroll
payouts.subtitle: Calculation by payout scheme for the chosen period. Closing creates an expense in the "Payroll" category.
payouts.empty: No visits in this period for active specialists.
payouts.confirm_close: Close {{period}}? An expense of {{total}} will be created and payroll for this period can no longer be recalculated.
payouts.status_active: Period is active — visits can still be added. You can close after {{period}}
payouts.status_ready: Period is over and ready to close
payouts.status_closed: Period is closed — expenses created, no changes can be undone

errors.not_finished: Period hasn't ended yet — too early to close

expenses.title: Expenses

form.receipt_placeholder: Attach a receipt — JPG, PNG, PDF (up to 10 MB)
form.receipt_placeholder_ocr: 📷 Snap a photo of the receipt — I'll fill the form automatically
form.receipt_too_big: File is too large. Max 10 MB.
form.ocr_done: Receipt read — check the fields and save
form.ocr_failed: Couldn't read it. Fill the fields manually.
form.recurrence_hint: We'll create the same expense automatically every period.

errors.amount_positive: Amount must be greater than zero

expenses.receipt_subtitle: Close this window to return to the expense list.

wfirma.toast_auto_pushed: Expense added and sent to wFirma ✓
wfirma.toast_already_pushed: This expense is already in wFirma
wfirma.toast_skipped_no_nip: Not sent to wFirma: no buyer NIP on the receipt. Use the "Send manually" button in the expense list.
wfirma.toast_skipped_nip_mismatch: Not sent to wFirma: NIP nabywcy on the receipt doesn't match your company. Use the "Send manually" button in the expense list.
